question: Which manufacturers work for more than 1 club?
sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Club_ID) > 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有多个俱乐部的制造商

semantic.reason: 原始问题询问的是哪些制造商服务于超过一个俱乐部，但SQL反向翻译的描述仅涉及'club'表和'Manufacturer'列，未体现'work for more than 1 club'的逻辑关系，也未包含必要的连接或计数操作。
